name: Gem-Knight Phantom Quartz
name_jp: ジェムナイト・ファントムルーツ
desc:
2 "Gem-" monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can add 1 "Gem-Knight" card from your Deck to your hand. You can pay 1000 LP; Fusion Summon 1 "Gem-Knight" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its materials from your GY or banishment into the Deck, but it cannot attack directly this turn. You can only use each effect of "Gem-Knight Phantom Quartz" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2 "Gem-" monsters

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Uses the player's banished cards as Fusion Materials
Returns Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon to Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
